name: jsdoc-markdown-mvp
description: Highlights Markdown syntax inside JSDoc comments for JS/TS/JSX/TSX.

jsdocMarkdownStyle.enabled.description: Enable JSDoc block background and italics override styling.

jsdocMarkdownStyle.backgroundColor.description: Background color for JSDoc blocks. Set to null or empty string to disable background.

jsdocMarkdownStyle.removeItalics.description: Render JSDoc text with normal font style to avoid inheriting comment italics.

jsdocMarkdownStyle.baseForegroundColor.description: Optional base foreground color hint for JSDoc markdown text. Configure via editor.tokenColorCustomizations using scope meta.jsdoc.markdown.

commands.title: JSDoc Markdown Style: Copy tokenColorCustomizations snippet
